to_buildworld.pivot_target: Open-source developer tools solving Big Tech technical gaps

build_now_1.description: Certify that your replacement LLM is behaviorally equivalent to the one it replaces — before you migrate. YAML test suite + 7-dimension behavioral scoring + parity certificate + CI gate.
build_now_1.biblical_pattern: PAT-041 — Revelation 5:1-9 (Seven Seals Worthiness) + PAT-042 — Proverbs 11:1 (Differing Weights)
build_now_1.key_differentiator: Migration authorization framing. Parity certificate concept. 7-dimensional scoring. CI gate for migration blocking.
build_now_1.status: IN-DESIGN — FULL SPEC COMPLETE — BUILD v0.1 NOW

build_now_2.description: Semantic mutation testing for LLM prompts. Introduces deliberate semantic mutations (negate constraint, drop clause, scope expand) and checks whether your eval suite detects them. Mutation score = % of mutations killed.
build_now_2.biblical_pattern: PAT-045 — Judges 6:36-40 (Gideon Fleece Inversion) + PAT-046 (Berean Null Test) + PAT-047 (Twelve Spies Divergence)
build_now_2.key_differentiator: The only tool that tests the quality of your eval suite — not just the prompt. Mutahunter for LLMs. 6 deterministic operators. Mutation score as CI metric.
build_now_2.status: IN-DESIGN — FULL SPEC COMPLETE THIS CYCLE — BUILD v0.1 NOW

build_now_3.description: Git-native prompt regression testing with judge calibration and trace-linked eval scoring for any LLM CI/CD pipeline
build_now_3.biblical_pattern: PAT-034 — Nehemiah 4:13-14 (guards at gaps in the wall)
build_now_3.key_differentiator: Judge calibration module — validates whether your LLM judge agrees with humans on your specific task before trusting it as a CI gate.

ship_now_1.description: Semantic LLM output specification compliance monitor. @spec decorator + SemanticConstraint DSL + DriftMonitor + CLI + GitHub Action.
ship_now_1.biblical_pattern: PAT-037 — Leviticus 10:1-3 (Authorized Fire — structural authorization ≠ semantic compliance)
ship_now_1.status: PROTOTYPE COMPLETE — SHIP TO PYPI NOW

ship_now_2.description: Git-native PR semantic intent verifier. Verifies that PR code changes fulfill the stated intent in the PR description.
ship_now_2.biblical_pattern: PAT-036 — Romans 7:7 (The law makes violations visible)
ship_now_2.key_differentiator: The only open-source tool that verifies whether a PR's code changes fulfill its stated intent — pre-merge, with a CI gate, for any git repo.
ship_now_2.status: PROTOTYPE COMPLETE — SHIP TO PYPI NOW

build_next_1.description: Behavioral contract enforcement for LLM function calls — @contract decorator + versioned behavioral specs + CI gate + drift detection
build_next_1.biblical_pattern: PAT-035 — Acts 2:1-13 (Pentecost — many languages, one coherent message contract)
build_next_1.status: DESIGN COMPLETE — BUILD AFTER prompt-lock v0.1

notes: Seven confirmed green-field tools in pipeline. llm-mutation solves the problem that every engineer has felt but no open-source tool has addressed: you have an eval suite, it passes, you ship, production breaks — because your eval suite was never tested. Gideon's Fleece is the most structurally explicit controlled experiment in Scripture: two conditions, deliberately inverted, to verify the oracle is reliable and not coincidence. The bowlful of water is the quantitative measurement — not a feeling, not a vibe, a measurement. llm-mutation is the bowlful of water. Your mutation score is your measurement. Ship when it's real.
